Meta.title: Travel Business Agency — High-end travel concierge
Meta.description: An agile international travel concierge: private jets, seminars, bespoke events, hotels, chauffeurs, VIP airport assistance and exceptional tailor-made journeys.

Hero.title: Your business and luxury travel,
Hero.subtitle: An agile concierge that designs, coordinates and executes every detail of your journeys: private jets, seminars, events and bespoke experiences, anywhere in the world.

Credentials.reassurance: Travel with peace of mind: an accredited agency and protected payments.
Credentials.iataDesc: Ticket issuance and access to the best airfares.
Credentials.apstDesc: Financial guarantee for your deposits and payments.

About.title: An agile travel concierge, built around your ambitions
About.p1: Based in Levallois-Perret, Travel Business Agency designs and orchestrates high-end travel experiences for companies and discerning individuals alike.
About.p2: From chartering a private jet to organising a seminar, an event or a fully bespoke journey, we handle every detail with the responsiveness of an agile team and the standards of a true service house.

Services.title: One team for your entire journey
Services.subtitle: From the first idea to the last mile, we manage the whole chain with precision and responsiveness.

jet.title: Private jet
jet.description: Private aircraft charter, optimised routing and absolute comfort, from takeoff to landing.

seminars.title: Seminars
seminars.description: Full organisation of your corporate seminars: exceptional venues, logistics and programming.

events.title: Bespoke events
events.description: Design and production of private and corporate events that match your ambitions.

prestige.title: Prestige events
prestige.description: VIP access to the greatest occasions: Roland-Garros, Formula 1, World Cup, festivals and galas.

hotels.title: Hotels & stays
hotels.description: Privileged access to the finest palaces, villas and confidential addresses worldwide.

restaurants.title: Restaurants & tables
restaurants.description: Bookings at the finest tables and Michelin-starred addresses, even when fully booked, worldwide.

clubs.title: Clubs & nightlife
clubs.description: Access to the most private clubs, VIP tables and exceptional nights out, skipping the queue.

chauffeur.title: Private chauffeur
chauffeur.description: Premium fleet and experienced chauffeurs for every transfer, with total discretion.

vip.title: VIP airport assistance
vip.description: Fast-track, private lounges and dedicated support for a frictionless airport experience.

bespoke.title: Tailor-made travel
bespoke.description: Fully personalised exceptional itineraries, built around your wishes and your schedule.

WhyUs.title: The standards of a maison, the agility of a startup
WhyUs.subtitle: We combine an international network of premium partners with a responsive team, without needless intermediaries.

agile.title: Total responsiveness
agile.description: A single point of contact who replies within the hour and acts immediately.

network.title: Global network
network.description: Trusted partners across more than 80 destinations on every continent.

tailored.title: 100% bespoke
tailored.description: No off-the-shelf packages: every journey is designed specifically for you.

discretion.title: Absolute discretion
discretion.description: Confidentiality and security at the heart of every service we deliver.

Process.title: From brief to experience, in four steps
Process.subtitle: A clear, transparent process to turn your needs into a perfectly orchestrated journey.

brief.title: Brief
brief.description: We listen to your needs, constraints and wishes to scope your project precisely.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.description: You receive a detailed, costed proposal, usually within 24 hours.

organization.title: Organisation
organization.description: We coordinate every provider and handle the entire logistics.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: You simply enjoy. We stay available 24/7 to adjust the smallest detail.

one.quote: Flawless organisation for our executive seminar in Geneva. Exceptional responsiveness and attention to detail.
one.author: Chief Executive Officer

two.quote: Private jet chartered within hours, perfect VIP welcome. Exactly the level of service we expected.
two.author: Family Office

three.quote: An unforgettable tailor-made trip, from the first exchange to the return. A team that is both pro and human.
three.author: Founder

Contact.title: Request your bespoke quote
Contact.subtitle: Describe your needs: we get back to you within the hour during business hours.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Dates, destinations, number of people, special requirements...
form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We'll reply very soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please retry or contact us directly on WhatsApp.
form.orWhatsapp: or message us directly on WhatsApp

Footer.tagline: International travel concierge. Agile, discreet, bespoke.
Footer.madeWith: Exceptional journeys, anywhere in the world.
